module RefModule (  
    input [3:0] data0,  
    input [3:0] data1,  
    input sel,  
    output reg [3:0] out  
);  
    always @(*) begin  
        if (sel)  
            out = data1;  
        else  
            out = data0;  
    end  
  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
    end
  end

endmodule
